February 1954

1

SUMMARY OF FEDERAL FISCAL OPERATIONS

(In millions of dollars)

| Period > Unnamed: 0_level_1 | Budget receipts and expenditures > Net receipts 1/ | Budget receipts and expenditures > Expenditures 2/ | Budget receipts and expenditures > Surplus, or deficit (-) 2/ | Net of trust account and other transactions 2/ 3/ > Unnamed: 4_level_1 | Clearing account 4/ > Unnamed: 5_level_1 | Net increase in public debt, or decrease (-) > Unnamed: 6_level_1 | Net increase in general fund balance, or decrease (-) > Unnamed: 7_level_1 | General fund balance > Unnamed: 8_level_1 | Levels, and of period > Public debt | Levels, and of period > Guaranteed securities | Levels, and of period > Total Federal securities | Levels, and of period > Subject to limitation 5/ |

Source: Actual figures from Daily Treasury Statement; estimates based on 1955 Budget document, released January 21, 1954. More detailed information with respect to the figures on this page is given in succeeding tables.
1/ Gross receipts less appropriations to the Federal Old-Age and Survivors Insurance Trust Fund and refunds of receipts, and also, beginning with the fiscal year 1954, appropriations of receipts to the Railroad Retirement Account.
2/ Transactions of the Foreign Economic Cooperation Trust Fund, established under Section 114 (f) of the Economic Cooperation Act of 1948 (62 Stat. 150), are consolidated with budget expenditures.
3/ Excesses of receipts, or expenditures (-).

Treasury Bulletin

2

Table 1.- Receipts by Principal Sources

(In millions of dollars)

| Fiscal year or month > Fiscal year or month | Internal revenue 1/ > Corporation 2/ | Internal revenue 1/ > Individual, not withheld 2/ 3/ | Internal revenue 1/ > Withheld by employers 4/ | Internal revenue 1/ > Total 5/ | Internal revenue 1/ > Employment taxes 6/ | Internal revenue 1/ > Miscellaneous internal revenue | Customs > Customs | Other receipts 1/ > Other receipts 1/ | Grose receipts > Grose receipts | Deductions > Total internal revenue | Deductions > Appropriations to FOASI Trust Fund 8/ | Deductions > Appropriations to Railroad Retirement Account 9/ | Net receipts > Net receipts | Unnamed: 14_level_0 > Refund of receipts 10/ |
